name: Unsuccessful logon
query: (productCode:pdi OR productCode:xns) AND (ruleName:"*unsuccessful*logon*" OR ruleName:"*failed*logon*" OR ruleName:"*logon*fail*")

name: Top File used
description: Most frequently accessed files in network activity

name: PUA Remote Access
query: (productCode:pdi OR productCode:xns) AND hostName:(*teamviewer.com OR *anydesk.com OR *logmein.com OR *gotomypc.com OR *remotedesktop.google.com OR *splashtop.com OR *zoho.com OR *realvnc.com OR *parallels.com OR *remotepc.com OR *uvnc.com OR *dwservice.net OR *ammyy.com OR *aeroadmin.com OR *tightvnc.com OR *nomachine.com OR *remoteutilities.com OR *connectwise.com OR *remmina.org)

name: PUA Cloud Storage
query: (productCode:pdi OR productCode:xns) AND hostName:(*dropbox.com OR *box.com OR *mega.nz OR *koofr.eu OR *mega.io OR *pcloud.com OR *mediafire.com OR *spideroak.com OR *disk.yandex.com OR *tresorit.com OR *wetransfer.com OR *owncloud.com OR *nextcloud.com OR *zippyshare.com OR *anonfiles.com OR *filemail.com OR *jottacloud.com OR *terashare.net OR *wasabi.com OR *hubic.com OR *scaleway.com OR *sharefile.com OR *ceph.io OR *backblaze.com OR *1fichier.com)

name: Bad States
query: (productCode:pdi OR productCode:xns) AND hostName:(*.kp OR *.ru OR *.ch OR *.cu OR *.by OR *.sy OR *.ir OR *.ve OR *.sd)

name: Russian IT-companies
description: Activity to Russian IT company domains
query: (productCode:pdi OR productCode:xns) AND hostName:(kaspersky.com OR ptsecurity.com OR solar.rt.ru OR infotecs.ru OR bi.zone OR innostage.ru OR norsi-trans.ru OR jet.su OR citadel.ru OR softline.com OR selectel.com OR yandex.cloud OR nano-av.com OR cognitive.ru OR platform.altergeo.ru)

name: EPP/EDR/XDR Vendors
query: (productCode:pdi OR productCode:xns) AND hostName:(Avast.com OR Avira.com OR AVG.com OR NortonLifeLock.com OR McAfee.com OR Sophos.com OR Cybereason.com OR Kaspersky.com OR malwarebytes.com OR carbonblack.com OR Bitdefender.com OR symantec.com OR CrowdStrike.com OR SentinelOne.com OR Trellix.com OR pandasecurity.com OR ultraantivirus.com)

name: Firewall Vendors
query: (productCode:pdi OR productCode:xns) AND hostName:(Cisco.com OR PaloAltoNetworks.com OR Fortinet.com OR CheckPoint.com OR Sophos.com OR Juniper.net OR SonicWall.com OR clavister.com)

name: US Vendors
